appraisal_events.evidence: « Oui, oui, tu peux continuer, » dit-elle ironiquement, en mimant « quelqu'un qui vous fait la barbe »; puis au danseur, en lui montrant Robert: « Regarde, il souffre. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The mistress ridicules Robert and displays his suffering in front of a dancer, an act described by the narrator as a momentary 'savage cruelty,' constituting a humiliating sidelining.

status_effects.explanation: Robert is publicly ridiculed and shown to be suffering, which places him locally in an emotionally weakened position despite his subsequent threat of rupture.
